title: Travel Agency Booking
context: You are planning a short holiday and visit a travel agency for advice. Discuss destination options, budget, accommodation, and transport. Explain your preferences and compare a few choices before deciding.
user_role: A customer looking for an affordable holiday package
agent_role: A travel consultant recommending destinations and packages
opening_prompt: Welcome to Horizon Travel. Tell me a little about the kind of trip you're looking for, and I'll suggest a few options.
